title: planchonella singuliflora
intro: Planchonella singuliflora, commonly known as the "wild plum," is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. This plant is prized for its potential health benefits, including its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Planchonella singuliflora are attributed to its bioactive constituents, which include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids.
